candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferable to totals/subtotals.
Revenue-related but clearly a component, not total revenue.
Segment/component revenue, not total revenue.
Valid total revenue synonym, but less preferred than the plain Revenue line when both exist.
Cost line, not revenue.
Non-operating income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings line, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet contract asset/liability style item, not the income statement top-line.

variables.notes: Use as priority list for reported revenue label changes over time; do not sum.

Candidate list was empty. Chose 'Publisher and revenue share cost' from the full preview because it is the clearest direct cost-of-revenue line. Manual review needed since the company may have limited/irregular COGS disclosure and this row is populated only sparsely in the preview.

candidates.why: Core overhead/personnel cost and a strong SG&A component.
Generic operating overhead bucket; suitable SG&A component.
Looks like a subcomponent/duplicate of other operating expenses and only appears for one year.
Would be a strong SG&A component semantically, though preview is empty.
Dedicated R&D line above EBIT; include in XSGA as well if broader overhead buckets selected do not clearly include R&D.
Balance sheet asset, not period SG&A expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A subtotal exists. Selected the best overhead buckets and included the separate above-EBIT R&D line so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes it.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization only, not the full R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, not the main period R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; best match.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line; also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS to enable subtraction in PROF.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line; best core financing-cost component.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses - excl Lease Interest Expense
candidates.why: Granular recurring finance cost if populated, but preview is empty.

candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest component; useful where separately disclosed.
Net finance subtotal; less preferred than underlying components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense related to VAT case
candidates.why: Case-specific/non-core interest; likely non-recurring.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense related to contingent consideration
candidates.why: Specific contingent consideration item; may be non-core or acquisition-related.
Not finance cost.
Not finance cost.
Potential direct interest expense label, but preview is empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental recurring lease-interest component; may provide coverage when main lease-interest row is sparse.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Equity item, not finance cost.
Equity item, not finance cost.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected recurring interest-cost components and avoided broad net finance totals that include non-interest items. Did not use supplemental lease-interest row to avoid possible duplication with the main lease-interest line.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the company

Equity component only, not total book equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.

candidates.why: Balancing row, not preferred.
Balancing row, not preferred.
Balancing row, not preferred.

candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the company
